title: Unctuous Smoky Peruvian Duck Arroz Con Pato
description: This Peruvian dish features tender duck and smoky flavors, served with a side of aromatic rice, making for a truly indulgent meal. The combination of charred and aerated elements creates a unique culinary experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the duck legs with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the duck fat in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the duck legs until browned on all sides.
Transfer the duck legs to the oven and roast for 20 minutes, or until the skin is crispy and golden brown.
While the duck is cooking, heat the chicken broth in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Arborio rice to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, until the rice is tender and creamy.
Char the aji amarillo peppers over an open flame, or in a dry skillet, until the skin is blistered and blackened.
Peel the peppers and chop them into small pieces, then stir them into the cooked rice.
Chop the cilantro and garlic, and stir them into the rice mixture.
To serve, place a duck leg on each plate, then spoon the smoky rice mixture alongside.
